zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Dene II於1142年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩時，他的父親William de Dene I22歲，母親Maud Matilda Dene22歲。他於大約1169年與Mrs William De Dene在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1175年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Dene II于1142年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩时，他的父亲William de Dene I22岁，母亲Maud Matilda Dene22岁。他于大约1169年与Mrs William De Dene在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1175年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dahn
meanings: habitational name from a place in the Palatinate called Dahn.
(Dähn): ethnic name for a Dane, from Old Norse Dan-.

variants.name: Dean
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English dene ‘valley’ (Old English denu), or a habitational name from any of several places in various parts of England named Dean or Dene from this word.

English: nickname or occupational name for the servant of a dean or nickname for someone thought to resemble a dean. A dean was an ecclesiastical official, the head of a chapter of canons or a church official with jurisdiction over a sub-division of an archdeaconry. Though no doubt some deans had illegitimate children, they were officially celibate, and in the main the surname is probably a nickname in origin, similar to Bishop , Prior , Priest , and Monk . The Middle English word deen, dien, dein, is a borrowing of Old French d(e)ien, doien from Latin decanus (originally a leader of ten men, from decem ‘ten’), and thus is a cognate of Deacon .
English: from the Middle English personal name Deyne (or Dene) a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Dene II was born in 1142, in Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Dene I, was 22 and his mother, Maud Matilda Dene, was 22. He married Mrs William De Dene about 1169, in Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1175, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

Il a épousé Mrs William De Dene environ 1169, à Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1175, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ko.Forest of Dean Nonconformist, Gloucester: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디 넌콘포미스트
ko.lifeSummary: William de Dene II(이)가 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Dene I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Matilda Dene(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디에서 Mrs William De Dene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Dene II родился в 1142 г. в местности форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Dene I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Matilda Dene, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs William De Dene около 1169 г. в местности форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1175 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
